name: _Group_Tool_Executor
content: Plan comparator decision recorded: reuse=True, restart_at_step=2. The new plan reorganizes the workflow but covers the same fundamental tasks: data validation, sensitivity analysis, Fisher forecasting, cross-section mapping, and synthesis. While the new plan is more granular in its Fisher analysis and sensitivity quantification, the core data processing and validation steps (Step 1 of the old plan) have already been executed. Therefore, we can reuse the results from the initial data preprocessing and baseline validation (Old Step 1) and restart the workflow from the sensitivity analysis phase (New Step 2).
